title: Define source-backed recommendation rules
action: Add local typed recommendation data and helpers in src/main.tsx: types CommandFact, SourceRef, RecommendationRule, RecommendationGroup, SimulatedProjectState, and a function recommendCommands(state: SimulatedProjectState): RecommendationGroup[]. The rule data must include sourceRef.path values that start with maestro-flow/ and must support equal-rank recommendations without selecting a fake primary command.
implementation: Refactor current ScenarioModel-only data by adding CommandRuleSet-oriented types above App.
Add authored command facts for at least maestro-brainstorm, maestro-blueprint, maestro-analyze, maestro-plan, maestro-execute, quality-review, quality-test, and maestro-ralph-execute.
Add sourceRef entries pointing to maestro-flow/.codex/skills/maestro-help/catalog.json and maestro-flow/.claude/commands/maestro-next.md where applicable.
Add validateRuleSet(ruleSet) that returns string[] for missing command references, missing sourceRefs, and sourceRef.path not starting with maestro-flow/.
Add tests in src/main.test.tsx that assert recommendation data contains sourceRefs and equal-rank groups can contain more than one command.
